wpcf7_contact_form.post_content:
<label> Your Name
    [text* your-name autocomplete:name] </label>

<label> Phone Number
    [text* your-phone autocomplete:name] </label>

<label> Email Address
    [text* your-code autocomplete:name] </label>

<label> Choose A Treatment
    [select your-service "Relaxing Massage" "Hydrating Facial" "Hot Stone Therapy"] </label>

[submit class:full-width-button "Submit"]
1
[_site_title] "[your-subject]"
[_site_title] <wordpress@creativthemes.com>
[_site_admin_email]
From: [your-name] [your-email]
Subject: [your-subject]

Message Body:
[your-message]

-- 
This is a notification that a contact form was submitted on your website ([_site_title] [_site_url]).
Reply-To: [your-email]

1
1

[_site_title] "[your-subject]"
[_site_title] <wordpress@creativthemes.com>
[your-email]
Message Body:
[your-message]

-- 
This email is a receipt for your contact form submission on our website ([_site_title] [_site_url]) in which your email address was used. If that was not you, please ignore this message.
Reply-To: [_site_admin_email]

post.post_content: There are many variations of passages of Lorem Ipsum available, but the majority have suffered alteration in some form, by injected humour, or randomised words which don't look even slightly believable. If you are going to use a passage of Lorem Ipsum, you need to be sure there isn't anything embarrassing hidden in the middle of text. All the Lorem Ipsum generators on the Internet tend to repeat predefined chunks as necessary, making this the first true generator on the Internet. It uses a dictionary of over 200 Latin words, combined with a handful of model sentence structures, to generate Lorem Ipsum which looks reasonable. The generated Lorem Ipsum is therefore always free from repetition, injected humour, or non-characteristic words etc.

page.post_content:
About Us

Committed to excellence in spa and wellness

Escape the stress of everyday life and indulge in luxurious spa treatments designed for your mind, body and soul.

To provide exceptional spa experiences that promote relaxation, healing, and complete wellness through expert care and natural therapies. At our spa, we believe true wellness comes from balance. Our expert therapists combine natural healing techniques with modern care to create a relaxing.

More About Us

settings.title: Committed to excellence in spa and wellness

settings.editor:
Escape the stress of everyday life and indulge in luxurious spa treatments designed for your mind, body and soul.

To provide exceptional spa experiences that promote relaxation, healing, and complete wellness through expert care and natural therapies. At our spa, we believe true wellness comes from balance. Our expert therapists combine natural healing techniques with modern care to create a relaxing.
